case_title: GROSSMAN DESIGN GROUP VS. PERRY ARCHITECTS INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROSSMAN DESIGN GROUP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED SEP-08-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY ARCHITECTS INC.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROSSMAN DESIGN GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY ARCHITECTS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF GROSSMAN DESIGN GROUP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHN GROSSMAN, OWNER. DEFENDANT PERRY ARCHITECTS INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY ARCHITECTS INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,997.50 FILED BY GROSSMAN DESIGN GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY ARCHITECTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROSSMAN DESIGN GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY ARCHITECTS INC. $9,997.50 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,152.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
